name: Drizzle mock chain
description: vi.mock db with select/insert/update/delete/execute as vi.fn(). drizzleChain<T>(value) helper creates thenable mock with from/where/orderBy/innerJoin/set/limit chained. layers.list uses db.execute (raw SQL) not db.select

content: @vitest-environment node needed for all server-side tests (argon2 native bindings, fs streams). vi.resetAllMocks() in beforeEach clears mockReturnValueOnce queues AND implementations. vi.clearAllMocks() preserves mockImplementation.

description: inArray(column, ids) crashes Drizzle mock columns in tests
resolution: Use per-id eq() loop instead of inArray when mocking

content: Test contracts not implementations: stub check (trivial stub must fail), no magic literals (assert relationships), >=1 adversarial case per file (empty/max/malformed/concurrent), names as spec (rejects negative quantities not test_3)

Shared test-utils.ts at apps/web/src/__tests__/test-utils.ts: exports drizzleChain<T>() (union return type covers db.select/insert/update/delete — callers never cast), mockContext(overrides?) (authenticated tRPC context), publicContext() (unauthenticated), and DbExecuteResult type. All router tests import from here instead of duplicating helpers.

name: mockExecuteResult helper
description: mockExecuteResult<T>(rows) in test-utils.ts — wraps { rows } as unknown as DbExecuteResult, centralizing the single cast for raw SQL execute mocks. Used in annotations.test.ts and maps.test.ts.

name: shapefile-import-test-pattern
description: Shapefile import test follows KML/GPX pattern: mock shpjs default+parseShp via Object.assign(vi.fn(), { parseShp: mockParseShp }), mock fs/promises, mock db+queries. Tests: zip, raw .shp, multi-FC array, null geometry filter, empty, unsupported extension.

name: transform-test-coverage
description: geo-engine transform.ts fully tested (24 tests): normalizeCoordinates, looksLikeWGS84, toRadians, toDegrees, computeBbox. Edge cases: anti-meridian, poles, empty arrays, single point.

name: annotation-object-test-mocks
description: Annotation objects test pattern: mock db and changelog module, use drizzleChain for select, mockExecuteResult for raw SQL. Service tests mock requireMapAccess via db.select (access.ts queries maps table). tRPC adapter tests use annotationsRouter.createCaller(mockContext({userId})).

name: discriminated-union-test-state-machine
description: Replace N boolean/nullable state vars with a single InteractionState union type. Getters derive from union (e.g., featurePickMode = type === 'pickFeature' && \!picked). simulateFeatureSelect guards transitions — only from idle/featureSelected. Actions like drawActionAnnotate move data atomically between variants instead of clear-then-set (fixes race conditions).

name: transitionTo-test-mirror
description: interaction-modes.test.ts mirrors MapEditor's transitionTo() in its createInteractionModes harness. Test transitionTo sets both interactionState and activeTool atomically, matching production behavior. New tests cover tool-reset on sidebar section change and annotation save.

name: Zod schema safeParse test pattern
description: Schema integration tests use safeParse + assert result.success; rejection tests verify error path contains the offending field name via issues.map(i => i.path.join('.'))

name: resolveFeatureId characterization test structure
description: Import real toFeatureUUID — no mock needed (pure/synchronous). Group by source pattern (properties._id, properties.id, feat.id fallback), priority chain, null-return cases, and edge cases (null/undefined/empty properties). Use three distinct UUID constants to unambiguously verify which level wins.

name: geo-access characterization tests
description: geo access control characterization tests live in apps/web/src/__tests__/geo-access.test.ts; covers requireMapOwnership (owns, missing, non-owner) and requireMapAccess (owner fast-path for all minRoles, non-owner+minRole=owner hides existence, collaborator role matrix: editor/viewer/commenter vs viewer/commenter/editor, no-collaborator NOT_FOUND). Uses drizzleChain + vi.mocked(db.select).mockReturnValueOnce pattern for sequential queries.

name: map-store-test-reset
description: mapStore characterization tests use module-level resetStore() helper (calls loadViewport+setBasemap+setInteractionMode+setMapInstance+setMapContainerEl) in beforeEach to prevent cross-test contamination, since the store uses module-level $state that persists across tests.

name: adversarial-stress-testing
description: Adversarial stress test suite for REST API: IDOR, null bytes, prototype pollution, forged cursors, concurrent PATCH/DELETE races, bbox edge cases, HTTP method confusion, integer overflow in query params. scripts/stress-test-api.ts phases 16-17.

name: terra-draw-mock-mode-stubs
description: vi.mock('terra-draw') must use mockImplementation(modeStub) for each mode (TerraDrawPointMode etc) — not bare vi.fn(). Real TerraDraw constructor iterates modes and calls .bind() on them; bare vi.fn() returns undefined causing TypeError in the full suite.

vi.resetAllMocks() in beforeEach wipes mock return values (not just call counts). Tests relying on changelog mocks (buildAddPatch, insertChangelog) after resetAllMocks fail with 'Cannot destructure property patch of undefined'.
resolution: Re-setup mock return values inside each test that needs them after resetAllMocks, or switch the describe block to vi.clearAllMocks() if clean call counts suffice.

content: FC1: Mock-Heavy DB Testing — All server-side tests mock db.execute via drizzleChain() helper from test-utils.ts. SQL correctness is never verified. Pattern: consistent and fast but creates blind spot for query regressions.

FC2: Component Complexity vs Testability — Team extracts logic into .svelte.ts store files and tests as pure state machines with DI. No Svelte component render tests exist despite @testing-library/svelte being installed. Components are untested at the rendering level.

FC3: Type Safety vs Third-Party Library Types — TYPE_DEBT annotations (16 instances) document every forced cast with upstream reason. no-explicit-any enforced as error everywhere. Only 1 eslint-disable for any in entire codebase. Well-managed tension.

FC4: Import Pipeline Consistency — Shared sanitization pipeline (shared.ts) with per-format adapters. All 6 import formats have test files. XSS stripping and key normalization tested in import-shared.test.ts. Well-factored.
FC5: CI Quality Gate Gaps — CI runs lint+test+check on push to main only. No PR-triggered CI, no pre-commit hooks, no format:check in pipeline. Formatting errors can land in main. Medium risk gap.

Replace @ts-nocheck in test files with targeted suppressions: use non-null assertions (!) for strict-null array index access (features[0]!), @ts-expect-error for mock/test-only type mismatches (discriminated union variants, Geometry widening), and restructure mock factories to avoid duplicate properties and invalid vi.fn() generic args. Never blanket-suppress — each suppression documents a specific mismatch.

name: ts-expect-error-discriminated-union-placement
description: @ts-expect-error placement for discriminated unions: when a test object literal has an invalid variant (e.g. measurement body in AnnotationContent union), the TS error surfaces on the discriminant field (kind: 'single'), not the invalid payload field. Place @ts-expect-error on the line immediately before the discriminant, not before the enclosing object or the invalid field.

name: mutation-flow-characterization
description: Characterization tests for Svelte component mutation flows: extract the async mutation logic (save/undo/error/cache) into a pure createSaveFlow() function with injected deps, test the contract without DOM or Svelte runtime. Follows existing interaction-modes.test.ts pattern.

title: DB integration test layer: testcontainers-node + transaction rollback
rationale: pg-mem lacks PostGIS support; 7/7 functions in geo/queries.ts use raw PostGIS SQL. testcontainers with postgis/postgis:16-3.4 is the only option that exercises ST_AsGeoJSON, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON, ST_Extent, ST_Transform, ST_GeomFromWKB. Transaction rollback gives per-test isolation without TRUNCATE overhead.

content: AnnotationObject shape (from @felt-like-it/shared-types) is camelCase with required fields: mapId, createdAt/updatedAt (Date objects), version, authorName, anchor: {type, geometry:{type,coordinates}}, parentId|null, authorId|null, templateId|null, ordinal, resolved. NO snake_case. Test fixtures that predate the rename had: map_id, created_at (ISO strings), flat anchor.coordinates — all migrated this session. No shared fixture file; each test inlines its own literal.

name: db.transaction stub missing in drizzleChain
description: annotation-objects and annotation-service test failures (16 tests: 'db.transaction …' errors) are PRE-EXISTING on master. drizzleChain() in apps/web/src/__tests__/test-utils.ts does not stub db.transaction(callback) that Wave 2-3 service code now uses. To fix: extend drizzleChain to invoke the callback with a tx argument that chains through the same mock builder.

name: e2e-feature-minting-via-convert
description: e2e specs that need pre-existing layer features mint them via the forward convert-annotations-to-layer round-trip — the features API has no public POST endpoint, and the seed script's three points use randomUUID() (non-deterministic). Pattern: createAnnotation → POST convert-annotations-to-layer → GET layers/:id/features → use returned IDs for reverse-direction tests.

content: annotation-groups.spec.ts covers the GROUP resource lifecycle (PATCH name/visible/parent/ordinal, idempotent DELETE, cross-tenant). The annotation-side of grouping (POST groupId on create, PATCH groupId, orphan-on-delete) is covered by Promise 17 of annotations-marketing.spec.ts. Don't duplicate.
